name: |•| Peak |•| clone #8
description:
The Peak has purple hair, black eyes (without irises, when angry they change color to red with patches of yellow, sometimes blue) with yellow whites and extremely thick eyebrows creeping over the eyes. In Fedor x 9, there was a scar on his nose, but due to changes in the canon, it will officially appear only in future chapters of The Land of Kings . In the card world, he is dressed in purple armor resembling samurai armor. The armor is decorated everywhere with the symbols of spades and the number "8". The boots have an unusual shape. There's a torn raincoat on the back.
In Fedor x 9, Peak wore a blue sweater with a black peak, black pants and gray shoes. In some shots, you can see a red and blue raincoat.
creator: mikomitiko22@gmail.com
